name: California Ricotta Cake
recipeIngredient: Package Devil's food cake mix - 18.25-oz size
Third cup semisweet chocolate chips - miniature size
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2 Grease and flour two 9-inch round cake pans.
3 Prepare cake mix according to package directions.
4 Turn batter into prepared pans.
5 Bake according to package directions (30-35 minutes).
6 Let cool in pans for 15 minutes, then unmold and let cool completely on wire racks.
7 In a medium bowl, combine ricotta cheese, powdered sugar, heavy cream, vanilla, and orange zest. Beat with an electric mixer on medium speed until light and fluffy, about 2 minutes. Stir in chocolate chips and diced almonds.
8 Sprinkle one tablespoon orange liqueur over top of each cake layer.
9 Stack cake layers together with cheese filling between and on top and sides.
10 Sprinkle remaining third cup almonds around top edge of cake in a 1-inch-wide ring.
11 Refrigerate until serving time.
